inline_comments.message:
I am always wondering about test-pyramid strategy when we are adding CSIT test and ask myself are these variations really using anything new form an integration point of view i.e a new  rest endpoint, or in these case a different type of Kafa topic/event?! 

if not teh n principe we should not add these test. you can always argue that one or 2 variation don't matter but eventually if we are no strict on this we end up with additional maintenance and running cost of tets that don't add value...

I strongly suspect that is not the case here, I think 1 operation e2e test will do it will test the rest endpoints and event handling. The operation-variations are will covered in unit test....

but lets discuss, maybe there is something I am missing that makes these test necessary...
